_comment: Ubuntu 22.04 LTS (jammy) cloud image -- apt FAMILY, debian-family (the consumer-supported). Mirrors the consumer ubuntu:22.04 container. PIN upstream_sha256 before building (fails closed until it matches): sha256 is published at https://cloud-images.ubuntu.com/releases/22.04/release/SHA256SUMS. Guest apt routes through the SSL-bump cache proxy; archive.ubuntu.com + security.ubuntu.com are allowlisted. Base packages only -- the consumer own installer pulls its deps. DISK: disk_size grows the golden's virtual disk at build time -- the stock ubuntu cloud image (~2-3.5GB) is too small for the rig install; cloud-init growpart expands the guest root to fill it on first boot. SHA NOTE: this cloud-image URL is ROLLING, so upstream_sha256 drifts when the vendor republishes -- if a build fails on a sha mismatch, re-pin it from the vendor SHA256SUMS (the same directory as upstream_url).
